title: Seercull
wikitext:
{{External|rs}} {{Infobox Item |name = Seercull |image = [[File:Seercull.png]] |release = [[7 November]] [[2005]] |update = Waterbirth Island - deeper, darker, deadlier! |members = Yes |quest = No |tradeable = Yes |placeholder = Yes |equipable = Yes |stackable = No |noteable = Yes |options = Wield, Drop |examine = An ancient Fremennik bow that was once used to battle the Moon Clan. |value = 8000 |weight = 1.360 |exchange = Yes |id = 6724 |leagueRegion = Fremennik }} [[File:Seercull detail.png|left|120px]] The '''seercull''' is a Fremennik bow that requires a [[Ranged]] level of 50 to wield, and fires arrows up to [[Amethyst arrow|Amethyst]]. Compared to a [[magic shortbow]], it has a slower rate of fire and a different [[special attack]] which is more effective against mages. In addition, its normal and rapid fire attacks have one more range than that of a [[shortbows|shortbow]], and its long range attack is equivalent to that of a [[comp bows|composite bow]]. It is a comparable weapon to the [[Magic comp bow]]. The name can be attributed to the combination of the word ''seer ''(another word for "mage" or "wizard") and the word ''cull ''(another word for "kill"), in other words, the ''mage-killer''. This is a fitting name because of the effect of its special attack and its examine text. {{clear|left}} ==Combat stats== {{Infobox Bonuses |astab = 0 |aslash = 0 |acrush = 0 |amagic = 0 |arange = +69 |dstab = 0 |dslash = 0 |dcrush = 0 |dmagic = 0 |drange = 0 |str = 0 |rstr = 0 |mdmg = 0 |prayer = 0 |slot = 2h |speed = 5 |attackrange = 8 |combatstyle = Bow |image = [[File:Seercull equipped.png|150px]] |altimage = [[File:Seercull equipped female.png|150px]] }} {{CombatStyles|Bow|speed=5|attackrange=8}} ==Special attack== [[File:Soulshot.gif|thumb|280px|A player using the bow's special attack, ''Soulshot''.]] The Seercull has a [[special attack]], ''Soulshot'', which consumes 100% of the player's special attack energy. It is [[Successful hit|guaranteed to hit]] and lowers the opponent's [[Magic]] level equal to damage dealt. However, damage inflicted by ''Soulshot ''is only boosted strictly through ammunition and visible range level. Ranged [[prayer]]s (such as [[Eagle Eye]] and [[Rigour]]) and all other equipment providing ranged strength, including those with special effects such as any variants of [[Void Knight equipment]], [[salve amulet]], or [[Slayer helmet]], will all have no effect. The special attack will only drain the opponent's Magic level if it is not already reduced; consecutive use of ''Soulshot ''or [[accursed sceptre]] special attacks will have no effect on their Magic level until the stat has been fully restored, at which point it may be reapplied.{{CiteTwitter|author=Mod Ash|url=https://twitter.com/JagexAsh/status/1282369216058982400|date=12 July 2020|quote=Same in PvP too, by the way, since I wasn't explicit earlier.|archiveurl=https://reldo.runescape.wiki/i/105845|archivedate=17 December 2020}} In PvP combat, the special attack gains use for its ability to lower the Magic level of a mage to prevent them from casting spells. However, this can be mitigated by use of [[super restore]] potions. The following formula can be used to calculate the max hit of ''Soulshot'':

\text{Maximum Hit} =\left\lfloor 0.5+\frac{\text{(Visible Ranged Level} + 10) *(\text{Ammo Ranged Strength} +64)}{640} \right\rfloor {{efn|name=stance|A stance bonus of 10 is used regardless of attack style used.}} {{notelist}} ==Item sources== {{Drop sources|Seercull}} ==Comparison between other ranged weapons== {{Ranged weapons comparison}} ==Used in recommended equipment== {{Used in recommended equipment|Seercull}} ==Treasure Trails== {{EmoteClueHeader}} {{EmoteClue|tier=elite|emote=Headbang|location=Outside the room with [[gargoyles]] on the [[Slayer Tower]]'s top floor|item1=Seercull|item2=combat bracelet|item3=helm of neitiznot}} {{EmoteClueBottom}} ==Trivia== *A character wearing [[spined armour]] and a seercull appears in the banner at the top of the ''Old School RuneScape'' [https://oldschool.runescape.com/ official website]. [[File:Official website banner logo.png|frame|left|The banner atop the official website featuring a seercull second from the right.]] {{Clear|left}} ==References== {{Reflist}} {{Ranged weapons}} {{Waterbirth Island}} [[Category:Defence reduction]] [[Category:Weapons with Special attacks]] [[Category:Collection log items]]
